Customer.description: Detailed structure of the customer model object showing its fields and data types.
Customer.title: Customer

id.description: A unique identifier for the customer.

mobile.description: The customer's mobile phone number without the country code.

mobile_code.description: The country code for the customer's mobile phone number.

email.description: The customer's email address.

urls.description: A list of URLs associated with the customer, such as their website or social media profiles.

avatar.description: A URL to the customer's avatar image.

timezone_type.description: The time zone type for the customer's date of birth.

timezone.description: The time zone for the customer's date of birth.

city.description: The city where the customer lives.

country.description: The country where the customer lives.

country_code.description: The country code for the customer's country.

currency.description: The currency that the customer uses.

location.description: The customer's location, represented as a string.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the customer's information was last updated.

groups.description: A list of group IDs that the customer belongs to.

CustomerGroup.description: Detailed structure of the customer group model object showing its fields and data types.
CustomerGroup.title: CustomerGroup

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to a specific group of customers.

name.description: The name or label for a the Customer Group.

conditions.description: Conditions for group membership, such as `total_sales > 100`, determine auto-assignment. For example, customers with sales exceeding 100 are added to the group automatically.

type.description: The type of the condition.

symbol.description: A symbol or function defining relationships between values, used in conditional logic.

value.description: The condition after the operator.

payment_method.description: The various methods of payment that are offered to a specific group of customers. List of payment methods can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394164).

shipping.description: The various delivery methods that are accessible or offered to a specific group of customers.

Tax.description: Detailed structure of the tax model object showing its fields and data types.
Tax.title: Tax

id.description: A unique identifier number used for tax purposes, often associated with individuals or businesses.

tax.description: The percentage at which a specific tax is applied to a given amount.

status.description: An individual or entity's position in relation to tax obligations, exemptions, and filing requirements.

country.description: The applicable country for taxation; use 'null' values to enforce taxes globally for all countries.

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a webhook.

name.description: The designated label assigned to a webhook.

event.description: An event that triggers a webhook to send real-time data between applications (from the events list).

type.description: Webhook type.

url.description: The address where a webhook sends data when a predefined event occurs.

version.description: The webhook version, with values of `1` or `2`, reflecting changes or updates to its functionality or structure.

rule.description:
operations, expressions, and conditions to your webhook, like =, !=, AND, or OR. For example: payment_method = YOUR_PAYMENT_METHOD , payment_method = mada OR price < 50
This enables precise response filtering based on your criteria.

headers.description: Details included in webhook requests, such as authentication and content metadata, ensure secure and accurate communication between web services. These are represented by `headers.key` and `headers.value`.

Authorization.description: Any header key, with its corresponding value, is sent within the POST request to the webhook URL.

Accept-Language.description: The value transmitted to the webhook, like this example: `cf-ray: 669af54ecf55dfcb-FRA`.

Payment.description: Detailed structure of the payment model object showing its fields and data types.
Payment.title: Payment

id.description: A unique code assigned to a payment option.

slug.description: A short identifier for a payment option.

name.description: A brief label for a payment option.

ProductValue.description: Detailed structure of the product value model object showing its fields and data types.
ProductValue.title: ProductValue

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a value associated with a product.

name.description: Identifying label for a product attribute.

price.description: The product price.

formatted_price.description: The extra formatted price added when a customer selects a specific value.

display_value.description: The UI displays values based on the option's display type. By default, it shows the name when `display_value=text`. For `image`, use the image ID (uploaded via the attach image endpoint). For `color`, provide a value like `#000` for black.

advance.description: Is the option value is advanced or not

option_id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a specific choice.

image_url.description: The web address where the corresponding image is hosted.

hashed_display_value.description:
if `option.type` = `image` then hashed display value return `image id`. 
if `option.type` = `text` then hashed display value return value `name`

translations.description: Translation of option values in different languages

is_default.description: This option will be enabled when this particular value is the default value.

is_out_of_stock.description: Whether or not the option value is out of stock.

Brand.description: Detailed structure of the brand model object showing its fields and data types.

value.name: زارا
value.description: زارا

Brand.title: Brand

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a specific brand.

name.description: The label given to a particular  company, to identify its products in the market. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

label.description: The label given to a particular  company, to identify its products in the market. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

status.description: Brand status

description.description: A brief summary of a company, highlighting key attributes, values, and offerings to convey its identity and purpose. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

banner.description: A text or URL linking to a banner file, used as a visual identifier for a brand on a webpage or platform.

logo.description: A text-based representation or URL link that directs to the logo file.

title.description: A concise metadata title used to improve search engine visibility and optimize a brand page’s search ranking. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

description.description: Concise content enhancing search visibility and social sharing.  🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

url.description: Web link for enhanced search engine visibility and social media sharing.  🌐 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

SpecialOffer.description: Detailed structure of the special offer model object showing its fields and data types.
SpecialOffer.title: SpecialOffer

id.description: A unique identifier associated with a particular promotional or discount offe.

name.description: A descriptive label or title given to a specific promotional offer to distinguish it from others. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

message.description: A brief statement or communication that conveys the details or benefits of a specific promotional or discount offer. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

expiry_date.description: The date when a specific promotional or discount offer expires or ends.

start_date.description: Special offer start date  is the date when a specific promotional or discount offer begins or becomes active.

offer_type.description: The category or classification that describes a particular promotion, discount, or deal.

status.description: The current condition of a specific discount offer, such as whether it is active, expired, or in a pending or inactive status.

show_price_after_discount.description: The option to show the price after discount.

show_discounts_table_message.description: Whether or not to show  information presented in a table format that displays various discounts.

countries.description: A list of customer countries that the offer applies to.

customer_groups.description: A list of customer groups which the offer applies to.

select_by.description: Specifies whether the customer country should be determined based on `mobile`, `shipping` or `ip`

applied_to.description: The specific products, services, or items to which a particular promotional or discount offer is intended or allowed to be used or applied, specifying what the offer covers within a product or service catalog.

discount_apply_type.description: Specifies whether the offer discount will be applied as a percentage or fixed amount.

condition_threshold.description: Minimum total purchase required to apply the offer, order_amount value or products_count value

max_customer_discount.description: Required if `discount_apply_type` is percentage. Specifies the maximum discount amount per customer.

discount_amount.description: The discount amount depending on the `discount_apply_type` it can represent a percentage or a fixed amount.

options.description: Options in case offer type is `cart_offer`

based_on.description: Offer calculation based on `order_amount` or `products_count`in case offer type is `cart_offer`

buy.description: Specifics on items required for offer eligibility.

type.description: Product Type to buy to be eligible for the special offer. Required if `offer_type = buy_x_get_y`

quantity.description: Product Quantity to buy to be eligible for the special offer. Required if `offer_type = buy_x_get_y`

products.description: The Products to be purchased that are included in the special offer. Make sure to pass the Product IDs in an array. This field is mandatory when `buy.type` is set to `product`.

categories.description: The Categories included in the special offer. Make sure to pass the Category IDs in an array. List of Category IDs can be foun [here](https://docs.salla.dev/5394207e0) This field is mandatory when `buy.type` is set to `category`.

get.description: Specifics of the offer.

type.description: The type of the offer.

discount_type.description: Discount Type to get if eligible for the special offer. Required if `offer_type = buy_x_get_y`

quantity.description: Product Quantity to get if eligible for the special offer. Required if `offer_type = buy_x_get_y`

products.description: The Products to get if eligible for the special offer that are included in the special offer. Make sure to pass the Product IDs in an array. This field is mandatory when `get.type` is set to `product`.

categories.description: The Categories included in the special offer. Make sure to pass the Product IDs in an array. This field is mandatory when `get.type` is set to `category`.

name.description: Name of the tier

min_purchases.description: The minimum value to apply the discount

type.description: Type of dicount whether its percentage or fixed

tiers.description: Tiers, returned in case the offer type is `tiered_offer`

with_current_cart.description: Specifies whether the current cart value should be included in the calculation

quantity.description: The required quantity for the `special price` offer to apply

price.description: The amount of the special price that the customer will get with the offer (tax exclusive)

applied_with_coupon.description: Whether or not the offer should be applied with a valid coupon

scopes.description: The scopes ids for the markets which the offer applies to

exclude_sale_products.description: Specifies whether the offer will apply to sale products or not, in case the offer type is `tiered_offer`

excluded_buy_products_ids.description: Array of product Ids execluded from the offer, in case the offer type is `tiered_offer`

excluded_buy_categories_ids.description: Array of category Ids execluded from the offer,  in case the offer type is `tiered_offer`

Branch.description: Detailed structure of the branch model object showing its fields and data types.
Branch.title: Branch

id.description: The unique identifier of a branch.

name.description: The label given to a specific branch. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

status.description: The status of the branch, indicating whether it is "Active" as open for business or "Inactive" as closed.

location.description: Branch's location on map in both longitude and latitude

postal_code.description: Branch's postal code. Value length is 5 characters long.

phone.description: Branch phone number.

preparation_time.description: The time required for the branch to get an order ready for shipping or pickup.

is_open.description: Whether or not the branch is currently `open` or `closed`

closest_time.description: The time when the branch will be closed based on the request time. Each request may have a different value.

working_hours.description: Branch working hours. Required if `branch.type is "branch"`

is_cod_available.description: Whether or not Cash on delivery available.

is_default.description: Whether or not this branch is the default branch for all operations.

type.description: Branch type, either a standard `branch` or `warehouse`

id.description: A unique identifier or code assigned to a specific city.

name.description: The lable used for a specific urban area or municipality within a country or region.

name_en.description: City name expressed in English characters.

Country.description: Detailed structure of the country model object showing its fields and data types.
Country.title: Country

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a specific country.

name.description: The official or commonly used name of a specific nation or geographic region.

name_en.description: Country name expressed in English characters.

code.description: Country iso code , a standardized, three-letter code assigned to each country by the International Organization for Standardization.

mobile_code.description: The international dialing code used to make phone calls to a specific country from abroad, also known as the country's "calling code."

City.description: Detailed structure of the city model object showing its fields and data types.
City.title: City

id.description: A unique identifier or code assigned to a specific city.

name.description: The lable used for a specific urban area or municipality within a country or region.

name_en.description: City name expressed in English characters.

Pagination.title: Pagination
Pagination.description: For a better response behavior as well as maintain the best security level, All retrieving API endpoints use a mechanism to retrieve data in chunks called pagination.  Pagination working by return only a specific number of records in each response, and through passing the page number you can navigate the different pages.

links.description: Array of linkes to next and previous pages.

ProductDetails.description: Detailed structure of the Product model object showing its fields and data types.
ProductDetails.title: ProductDetails

id.description: A unique identifier for a specific product within a database.

title.description: Name of a marketing or advertising campaign, offer, or special event to attract and inform potential customers about the promotion's content or benefits. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

sub_title.description: A secondary title that provides additional context about a promotion, complementing the main title. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit is a unique alphanumeric code used to identify and manage specific products within a company's inventory.

mpn.description: Manufacturer Part Number (MPN) is a unique identifier assigned by manufacturers to products.

gtin.description: "Global Trade Item Number" (GTIN), a unique and standardized identifier used to uniquely represent products in the global marketplace.

type.description: The categorization of a product based on its characteristics, features, or intended use.

name.description: A label for an item, aiding in easy identification and categorization within a product listing. 🌐 [Supports multi-language](doc-421122)

short_link_code.description: A short and simplified alphanumeric code or URL used to provide a quick and easy way to access or share a specific product's webpage or information.

pre_tax_price.description: Product price details before the tax is applied.

amount.description: Product tax price amount before the tax is applied.

currency.description: Product price currency before the tax is applied..

description.description: A detailed information about an item. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

quantity.description: The number of items available in stock.

unlimited_quantity.description: Whether or not the product is of unlimited quantity.

status.description: Product status refers to the current state of availability of a particular item within a product catalog or inventory.

is_available.description: Whether or not the product is available.

views.description: The total number of times a specific product has been viewed by users.

sale_price.description: The information about the discounted price or special pricing for a product.

sale_end.description: The date or time when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to expire.

require_shipping.description: Whether or not the product necessitates a physical delivery process or can be provided digitally without shipping.

cost_price.description: The amount a business pays to acquire or manufacture a product before any additional expenses, such as overhead or markup, are applied

weight.description: The weight of the product represented in numerical form if applicable.

weight_type.description: The classification or unit of measurement used to specify the weight of an object or item, such as kilograms (kg), pounds (lb), ounces (oz), or grams (g).

with_tax.description: Whether or not a tax applied to this product or not.

url.description: The hyperlink that leads to a specific product's page.

id.description: product image ID  is a unique identifier or code assigned to a specific product image within a database or system, enabling efficient management and retrieval of images associated with a product.

url.description: The web addresses or hyperlinks that point to the online locations of images associated with  the product, making it possible to display those images on websites, e-commerce platforms, or other online channels.

type.description: Product images type as `image` or `video`.

sort.description: Product images sort number,  a numerical value or order assigned to product images to determine their sequence or arrangement when displayed.

three_d_image_url.description: The URL of a 3D image, A product can only has __one__ product image with a 3D URL.

main_image.description: The URL of the main image of the product.

images.description: Visual representations or pictures of a product, to showcase its appearance, features, and details to potential customers.

sold_quantity.description: The total number of items of the product that have been purchased or sold over a certain period.

rating.description: Product rating details, include information about the ratings and reviews provided by customers for a specific product.

total.description: Total quantity of  reviews or ratings that a specific product has received, which is often used as a metric to assess the popularity and credibility of the product.

count.description: Counted number of ratings to the product

rate.description: The numerical evaluation or score given to a product based on level of satisfaction.

max_items_per_user.description: The limit set on the number of products that an individual user is allowed to purchase.

maximum_quantity_per_order.description: Maximum quantity per order for the customer or the maximum quantity for the product.

show_in_app.description: Whether or not to show the product in the App.

hide_quantity.description: Whether or not to hide the product quantity.

channels.description: The product to appear in specific channels.

managed_by_branches.description: Whether or not to indicate if the product is managed by branches.

installments.description: Payment gateways that supports install-mental payments, which have been activated by the merchant from the [dashboard](https://s.salla.sa/payment).

name.description: Payment gateway name, the identifier of a specific payment processing service or platform that facilitates online transactions by securely transferring payment information between a customer, a merchant, and a financial institution, allowing for the authorization and settlement of payments for goods or services.

title.description: Payment gateway title,

logo.description: Payment gateway logo, a text string containing the URL or file path to an image file that serves as the logo for a particular payment gateway.

details.description: Comprehensive information about a specific payment processing service.

starting_price.description: The merchant owner should activate this feature from his store from [here](https://s.salla.sa/settings/component/options).

amount.description: Product starting price amount,the initial or base price at which a product is offered for sale, typically before any additional options, variations, or customizations are factored in, and it serves as the starting point for pricing.

currency.description: Currency of the starting price amount.

allow_attachments.description: Whether or not to allow adding attachments to the prodcut details.

is_pinned.description: Whether or not to show if the prodcut is pinned.

pinned_date.description: The date which the product was pinned at.

sort.description: Passing sort will no longer update product sort, use ctegory create/update endpoints to do that.

active_advance.description: Whether or not to activate advance product details.

enable_upload_image.description: Whether or not to allow image uploading.

options.description: The additional choices that can be selected to customize the product according to preferences.

title.description: Product de SEO Metadata Title which is a concise label used to optimize search engine results and enhance the visibility of a product details page. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

description.description: A succinct summary crafted to enhance search engine optimization . 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

url.description: The web address of the Product Deatils page with embedded metadata (title, description, keywords) to enhance its search engine visibility. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

metadata.description: The data that describes other data, providing details on its creation, format, and context.

id.description: Unique identifier or code assigned to a specific booking or reservation, used for tracking, reference, and management purposes

location.description: The specific place or venue where a booking or reservation is made, such as a hotel, restaurant, event venue, or transportation service.

type.description: Refers to the category or classification of a reservation or booking, indicating the nature or purpose of the booking. Required if `booking_details != null`

session_duration.description: Booking duration is mandatory when the booking type is set as `date_time`.

session_gap.description: Booking session gap is necessary when the booking type is `date_time`, and it specifies the amount of time between consecutive booking sessions or appointments.

sessions_count.description: Booking Sessions Count, which is the number of sessions allowed for one customer . Required if `booking_details != null`

time_strict_value.description: A timeframe where it is not applicable to make reservations.

time_strict_type.description: The restriction on making bookings within a specific timeframe is measured in minutes, hours, or days.

availabilities.description: Available slots for booking. Required if `booking_details != null`

day.description: Days which are available for booking.

from.description: The starting time of the of available booking slot in 24 hours format. Required if `booking_details.type = date_time`

to.description: The ending time of the of available booking slot in 24 hours format. Required if `booking_details.type = date_time`

overrides.description: Overwrite availability for a particular day, on a particular date.

id.description: Booking Overrides ID

date.description: The value of specific date that has been overridden in a booking

booking_details.description: The information related to a specific booking, such as date, time, location, and other relevant particulars

categories.description: The various sections or attributes that describe a product, such as name, price, description, specifications, and availability.

id.description: A unique identifier or code assigned to a specific tag or label used for categorization or classification purposes within a system or database.

name.description: The label or identifier assigned to a specific tag, used for categorizing or organizing items, content, or data within a system or database.

scope_id.description: Branch (scope) unique identification. Get a list of Scope IDs related to the store from [here](https://docs.salla.dev/15104922e0)

price.description: Price of the item / product based on the branch (scope)

cost_price.description: Cost price of the item / product based on the branch (scope)

sale_price.description: Item reduced price due to sale based on the branch (scope)

sale_end.description: End of the sale of the product / item before the original price is back based on the branch (scope)

sale_start.description: Start of the sale of the product / item before the original price is back based on the branch (scope)

currency.description: Price's currency based on the branch (scope)

ProductOption.description: Detailed structure of the product option model object showing its fields and data types.
ProductOption.title: ProductOption

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a specific product configuration or variant.

name.description: The label or title used to describe a specific choice or attribute associated with a product.

description.description: A text or content that provides detailed information about a product.

type.description: Type of the product option, it can be a `radio` button or `checkbox`

required.description: Whether or not the product option is obligatory.

associated_with_order_time.description: The product option is only relevant to order receiving time when it pertains to date-time selections. **ONLY** for date time options.

sort.description: Product option sort refers to the method or criteria used to arrange or order product options.

display_type.description: The manner in which product choices or attributes are presented.

visibility.description: Product option visibility based on condition is applied exclusively to products categorized as 'food' or 'service'.

visibility_condition_option.description: Whether or not Product option is visible.

visibility_condition_value.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific value or choice within a product option.

OrderTag.description: Detailed structure of the orders tag model object showing its fields and data types.
OrderTag.title: OrderTag

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a tag associated with an order.

name.description: A textual identifier used to describe a tag associated with an order.

Order.description: Detailed structure of the Order model object showing its fields and data types.
Order.title: Order

id.description: A unique alphanumeric code or identifier assigned to a specific order. List of orders can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394146)

cart_reference_id.description: A unique alphanumeric code or identifier assigned to a specific order cart.

reference_id.description: A specific alphanumeric identifier associated with an order.

customer.description: Customer link directly to the order.

admin.description: Admin dashboard link directly to the order.

digital_content.description: A direct URL link to the digital asset, such as an e-book, image, PDF, video, or any downloadable file linked to the order or product.

rating.description:
Order Rating Link.
Note that the order has to be of either of the following statuses: `completed`, `delivered`, or `shipped`. The merchant has to allow the product to be rated from the [Store Settings](https://s.salla.sa/settings) > Rating Settings

checkout.description:
Order Checkout URL.
Note that the variable will only be returned if the order is unpaid. If the order is already paid, the variable will not appear in the response.

date.description: Date and time of the order.

draft.description: Whether or not  the order 's status is set to `draft`

read.description: Whether or not the Merchant has read the order

source_device.description: The machine or device used when the customer placed the order.

type.description: Order Source Type

value.description: Order Source Value

device.description: The electronic device, such as a computer, smartphone, or tablet, through which an order or purchase is initiated or processed.

user-agent.description: a piece of information sent by a web browser or other client software, that provides details about the user's browser, device, and operating system when an order or action is initiated.

ip.description: The Internet Protocol (IP) address associated with the device or network location from which an order or transaction request originates, providing information about the geographical or network source of the order.

status.description: Order status.

is_price_quote.description: Whether or not to quote order price.

payment_method.description: The specific payment option chosen by a customer to pay for a product or service as part of an order.

currency.description: The currency in which order costs and prices are expressed and processed.

amount.description: Order cash on delivery cost amount

currency.description: Order cash on delivery cost curreny

title.description: The name or label given to a specific discount or promotional offer applied to an order, helping to identify and describe the type of discount or deal being applied to the order's total cost.

type.description: The category or classification of the discount or promotional offer applied to an order, indicating the nature or mechanism of the discount, such as percentage-based, fixed amount, free shipping, buy one get one free, or any other specific type of discount.

code.description: A unique alphanumeric sequence or code that can be u during the checkout process to apply a specific discount.

discount.description: The numerical amount or percentage by which the total cost of an order is reduced as a result of a discount or promotional offer, representing the savings or reduction in price that the customer receives.

discounted_shipping.description: A reduction in the cost of shipping services associated with an order, typically provided as part of a promotional offer or incentive, resulting in a lower shipping fee.

amount.description: The final sum that is required to be paid for the order, including the prices of all items or services ordered, any applicable taxes, fees, and shipping costs, as well as any discounts or promotional savings that have been applied.

currency.description: he specific currency in which the total cost of an order is expressed, representing the monetary unit used for calculating and displaying the final amount required to be paid for the order.

base_currency.description: The default currency for the store

rate.description: The rate which the base currency got converted when placing the order

can_cancel.description:
The option to enable order cancellation by the store customer.
`True` value should be set if the order status is in under review and in progress, as according to the store settings.

show_weight.description: Whether or not to show the weight value.

can_reorder.description: Whether or not to enable reorder .

is_pending_payment.description: The option of displaying order is pending payment to the customer when the order status is `payment_pending`.

rating_link.description:
The rating URL to review the order.

🛑 The variable is to be deprecated; use `data.urls.rating` variable instead.

checkout_url.description:
The checkout URL to settle payments related to the order

🛑 The variable is to be deprecated; use `data.urls.checkout` variable instead.

pending_payment_ends_at.description: Last date allowed to customer to pay the order.

id.description: A unique identifier, typically numerical or alphanumeric, assigned to a specific shipping or delivery process associated with an order within a system or database, facilitating tracking and management of the shipping details and status related to that order.

app_id.description: A unique identifier, typically numerical or alphanumeric, associated with a specific shipping application used to manage and track the shipping and delivery of orders.

shipping_details_id.description: Shipping Estimate Rate ID. Get a list of estimate rate IDs from [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-6899590)

company.description: The company or service provider responsible for the transportation and delivery of an order from the seller or sender to the recipient or customer.

logo.description: A text or string variable that stores the name or path to the image file of a shipping company's logo.

name.description: The name of the customer designated to receive and take possession of the goods or services specified in an order.

email.description: he email address associated with the customer designated as the recipient of an order, often used for communication, notifications, and confirmation related to the order, including shipping updates and order-related information.

phone.description: The telephone number associated with the customer designated as the recipient of an order, commonly used for communication, coordination, and contact purposes, particularly in the context of order delivery or customer service inquiries.

name.description: the name of the individual, business, or entity responsible for shipping and sending out an order, typically used for identifying the sender or shipper of the goods or services specified in the order.

company_name.description: The name of the company or business entity responsible for shipping and sending out an order.

email.description: The email address associated with the individual or entity responsible for shipping and sending out an order, often used for communication and contact purposes related to the shipping and fulfillment of the order.

phone.description: The telephone number associated with the individual or entity responsible for shipping and sending out an order, typically used for communication, coordination, and contact purposes, particularly in matters related to the shipment and fulfillment of the order.

country.description: The specific country in which the location or address for picking up an order is situated.

country_code.description: A standardized code or abbreviation that represents the specific country where the location or address for picking up an order is situated.

city.description: The name of the city or urban area where the location or address for picking up an order is situated.

shipping_address.description: The location or address where the order is to be delivered or shipped to in order to be picked up.

street_number.description: The specific numerical identifier associated with a building or location on a street where a customer intends to pick up an order.

block.description: The particular block or section on a street where a customer intends to pick up their order.

postal_code.description: The postal code associated with the location where a customer plans to pick up their order, aiding in precise order retrieval.

lat.description: Pick Up address GEO coordinates latitude

lng.description: Pick Up address GEO coordinates longitude

country.description: The country specified in the address where an order is to be shipped, providing the destination for the order's delivery.

country_code.description: The code for the destination country in an order's shipping address, often following ISO standards (e.g., "US" for the United States).

city.description: The name of the city or urban area specified in the address where an order is to be shipped, identifying the destination city for the order's delivery.

shipping_address.description: The complete address provided for the delivery of an order, typically including details such as street name, house or building number, city or locality, postal or ZIP code, and country, ensuring accurate shipment to the intended destination.

street_number.description: The specific numerical identifier associated with a building or location on a street in the address provided for the delivery of an order.

block.description: specific section or segment of a street or road mentioned in the address for the delivery of an order.

postal_code.description: The numeric or alphanumeric code included in the address for the delivery of an order, representing a specific geographic area within a country or region.

id.description: A unique identifier, typically numerical or alphanumeric, assigned to a specific shipment or parcel associated with the order.

pickup_id.description: A unique identifier for the pickup or collection of a shipment related to an order, aiding in tracking and management.

tracking_link.description: A URL provided to customers for real-time order status updates.

format.description: The layout of information on a shipment label, aiding in proper identification during shipping.

url.description: A textual context to represent the shipment URL.

boxes.description: the quantity or count of individual boxes or packages associated with a shipment when creating an Air Waybill (AWB)

id.description: A unique identifier, typically numerical or alphanumeric, assigned to individual shipments.

created_at.description: Timestamp indicating time and date of creating the order shipment.

type.description: Calssification of the characteristics and handling requirements of a shipment.

courier_id.description: A unique code for a courier or delivery service provider

courier_name.description: The title or label that identifies a specific courier or delivery service provider.

courier_logo.description: A textual representation, often in the form of a file path or URL, that specifies the location or reference to the image file containing the logo of a courier or delivery service provider.

shipping_number.description: A reference or identification number associated with a specific shipment, typically used for tracking and monitoring the status and progress of the shipment during the transportation and delivery process.

tracking_number.description: A unique identifier assigned to a shipment, allowing customers and logistics personnel to track and monitor its status and location during transit.

pickup_id.description: A unique identifier, typically numerical or alphanumeric, assigned to a specific pickup request or arrangement related to shipments, helping to track and manage the pickup details for various shipments.

trackable.description: The option to indicate that the shipment is trackable.

tracking_link.description: A  web link provided to track the status and location of a shipment in real-time.

format.description: The layout and structure used to display information on a label affixed to a shipment.

url.description: A web link that provides access to a digital shipment label for tracking and identification during shipping.

payment_method.description: The way a customer chooses to pay for a product or service.

source.description: The origin or source of a shipment, providing information about where the shipment was initiated or generated.

type.description: The classification or categorization of the destination or recipient for a shipment, often used to differentiate between various delivery addresses or locations.

name.description: The name of the individual or entity to whom a shipment has been sent or delivered. It identifies the recipient or destination for the shipped items.

email.description: The email address associated with the individual or entity to whom a shipment has been sent or delivered.

phone.description: The phone number associated with the individual or entity to whom a shipment has been sent or delivered.

country.description: The country associated with the individual or entity to whom a shipment has been sent or delivered.

country_id.description: A unique idnetifier for the country for the country

country_code.description: A code that represents the specific destination country to which a shipment has been sent or is being delivered.

city.description: The city associated with the individual or entity to whom a shipment has been sent or delivered.

city_id.description: A unique idnetifier for the country for the city

address_line.description: A specific part of an address that typically contains a portion of the location details, such as the street name, house or building number, apartment or suite number, and any other relevant information necessary for proper identification and delivery of mail or shipments.
examples: شارع Makkah, Makkah، الحي NEW YORK 11434،, Makkah, Makkah,, جدة, السعودية

street_number.description: The specific numerical identifier associated with the street or road address to which a shipment has been sent.

block.description: A specific section or segment of a street or road mentioned in the address where a shipment is being delivered.

postal_code.description: The code in a shipment address used for accurate location sorting.

type.description: The name of the branch or location from which a shipment originates or is sent. It specifies the point of origin for the shipment.

name.description: The name of the individual or entity that is sending or originating the shipment, indicating the sender's identity or organization.

company_name.description: The name of the company or business entity that is sending or originating the shipment, identifying the organization responsible for sending the items.

email.description: The email address associated with the individual or entity that is sending or originating the shipment, often used for communication and contact purposes related to the shipment's origin.

phone.description: The telephone number associated with the individual, company, or entity that is sending or originating a shipment. This phone number is often used for contact, communication, or inquiries related to the shipment's origin or pickup.

country.description: The country from which a shipment originates or is sent. It identifies the location or country of the sender or the point of origin for the shipment.

country_id.description: A unique idnetifier for the country

country_code.description: A code that represents the specific destination country to which a shipment has been sent or is being delivered.

city.description: The city from which a shipment is sent. It identifies the city of the sender or the point of origin for the shipment.

city_id.description: A unique idnetifier for the country for the city

address_line.description: A part of the shipment's origin address that typically contains details such as the sender's street name, house or building number, apartment or suite number, and any other relevant information.

street_number.description: The specific numerical identifier associated with the street or road address from which a shipment has been sent.

block.description: A specific section or segment of a street or road mentioned in the address where a shipment is being sent from.

postal_code.description: The code in a shipment address used for accurate location sorting.

branch_id.description: A unique identifier, often numerical or alphanumeric, associated with the specific branch or location where a shipment originates or is dispatched.

value.description: Total weight value

units.description: The units of measurement used to express the total weight of a shipment. This could be in kilograms (kg), pounds (lb), grams (g), or any other weight measurement unit.

name.description: Shipment Packages Name

sku.description: Shipment Packages SKU

currency.description: Shipment Packages Price Currency. You may refer to the external Merchant API Docs for the List of Currencies from [here](api-5394257/?nav=1)

quantity.description: Shipment Packages Quantity

value.description: Shipment Packages Weight

name.description: A label for a product variation or choice, like size or color.
The descriptive label or text representing a specific choice or value within a product option.

value.description: The value of the option

values.description: If `type` value is set to `radio` or `checkbox`, the returned response is an array. Otherwise, an object is returned in all other available `type` values.

is_international.description: The option to indicate if the shipment is internationa

app_id.description: A unique code or label used to identify and distinguish a specific App.

id.description: A unique identifier, typically numerical or alphanumeric, assigned to an individual item or product within an order.

name.description: he name or description of an individual item or product within an order.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit, and it is a unique code or identifier used to track and manage individual products or items in inventory, facilitating inventory management, sales tracking, and product identification.

quantity.description: The numerical count of a specific item or product included in an order, indicating how many of that particular item have been purchased or are part of the order.

currency.description: The specific currency in which the price or value of an individual item within an order is expressed, indicating the monetary unit used for pricing that particular item.

weight.description: The numerical measurement representing the weight of an individual item or product within an order.

weight_label.description: A textual label or description associated with the weight of an individual item within an order, typically used to indicate the unit of measurement (e.g., kg, lb) and provide clarity regarding how the item's weight is expressed.

amount.description: Order item amounts price without tax

currency.description: Order item amounts price without tax currency

amount.description: Total discount amount of the order item amounts.

currency.description: Order item amounts total discount currency
Total discount currency of the order item amounts.

id.description: A unique identifier, often numerical or alphanumeric, assigned to a specific item.

product_option_id.description: A unique identifier, often numerical or alphanumeric, assigned to a specific product option , enabling easy tracking and management of various product configurations, such as size, color, or other customizable features.

name.description: A label for a product variation or choice, like size or color.

type.description: Type of the product option.

value.description: If `type` value is set to `radio` or `checkbox`, the returned response is an object. Otherwise, a string is returned in all other available `type` values.

id.description: A unique identifier, typically numerical or alphanumeric, associated with a specific value or choice within a product option.

name.description: The descriptive label or text representing a specific choice or value within a product option.

id.description: A unique identifier, typically numerical or alphanumeric, associated with a specific product image in a database or system, enabling easy tracking and referencing of images used for a product.

image.description: Textual reference, such as a file path or URL link, that points to the location of an image file representing a product.

type.description: Type of the product image.

code.description: Product codes value

status.description: Product codes status

url.description: A web address (URL) that provides access to a file associated with a product.

name.description: the name or title of a file associated with a product.

size.description: The numerical measurement that represents the size of a file associated with a product.

id.description: A unique identifier, often numerical or alphanumeric, associated with a specific bank account .

status.description: Bank status

id.description: A unique identifer for the store

store_id.description: A unique identifer for the store

user_id.description: A unique identifer for the store user

name.description: Store name

date.description: A specific point in time, typically expressed in terms of a calendar system, including the day, month, year, hour, minutes, seconds and nano seconds. For example: "2020-10-14 14:28:03.000000"

timezone_type.description: Timezone type of the date, for Middel East = 3

ProductCard.description: Detailed structure of the Product short payload model object showing its fields and data types.
ProductCard.title: ProductCard

id.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific product.

type.description: The category or classification that a specific product belongs to based on its attributes, characteristics, or intended use.

title.description: The name or label assigned to a specific marketing or promotional campaign, deal, or offer.

sub_title.description: The additional name or label assigned to a specific marketing or promotional campaign, deal, or offer.

status.description: The product status. available values 'hidden','sale','out'.

is_available.description: Check if the product is available to order or in-stock.

sku.description: A unique Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) identifier assigned to a specific variant of a product.

name.description: The name or title of a product.

price.description: Product price details

url.description: Product url

has_special_price.description: Whether or not the product has a special price

currency.description: The specific currency of the product price.

thumbnail.description: Scaled-down image or visual representation of a product.

mpn.description: Manufacturer Part Number, a unique identifier assigned by a manufacturer to a specific product or component, which helps distinguish it from other similar products and facilitates inventory management, product tracking, and ordering processes.

gtin.description: "Global Trade Item Number" (GTIN), a unique and standardized identifier used to uniquely represent products, items, or services in the global marketplace, to enable efficient tracking and management across supply chains and retail sectors.

id.description: A unique alphanumeric code or identifier assigned to a specific order.

reference_id.description: A specific alphanumeric code or identifier associated with an order.

total.description: The amount representing the total expense incurred for all the items in the order.

status.description: Status of the order.

draft.description: Whether or not the order is a draft or no.

read.description: Whether or not the order is read by the merchant or not

can_cancel.description:
Whether or not the order is allowed to be cancelled by store customers.
`True` value should be set if the order status is in under review and in progress, as according to the store settings.

can_reorder.description: Whether or not the order allowed to be re-order by customers.

is_pending_payment.description: Whether or not the order is waiting to be paid or the order status is `payment_pending`.

pending_payment_ends_at.description: The time untill the payment has to be made by the cusotmer

digitalable.description: Whether or not there is a digital label for the order

shippable.description: Whether or not this order is shippable by shipping companies

has_suspicious_alert.description: Whether or not the order contains any suspicious fraud payments

name.description: The label or description associated with a specific item.

quantity.description: The numerical value representing the number of units or items of a specific product.

URLs.description: To help companies and merchants, Salla provides a “urls” attribute that has been added to different modules to guide the merchants to have the full URL of this module from both scopes, the dashboard scope as a store admin, and as a customer.
URLs.title: Urls

customer.description: Customer link directly to the order.

admin.description: Admin dashboard link directly to the order.

digital_content.description: A direct URL link to the digital asset, such as an e-book, image, PDF, video, or any downloadable file linked to the order or product.

rating.description:
Order Rating Link.
Note that the order has to be of either of the following statuses: `completed`, `delivered`, or `shipped`. The merchant has to allow the product to be rated from the [Store Settings](https://s.salla.sa/settings) > Rating Settings

checkout.description:
Order Checkout URL.
Note that the variable will only be returned if the order is unpaid. If the order is already paid, the variable will not appear in the response.

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a specific invoice. Invoice list can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394157)

invoice_number.description: The invoice number as in the order.

uuid.description: Another unique identifier of the invoice

order_id.description: A unique identifier assigned to a specific order.

invoice_reference_id.description: A unique identifier assigned to aninvoice. This is especially used if the invoice is issued outside Salla system.

type.description: Invoice type.

ProductVariant.title: ProductVariant

id.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific variant of a product or item.

price.description: The price of the product variant.

amount.description: The amount of the product price. Example: 96.33

regular_price.description: The regular price of the product variant.

cost_price.description: The purchase price excluding any additional expenses.

amount.description: The value of the cost price amount. Example: 100.33

sale_price.description: The sale price of the product variant.

amount.description: The value of the sale price a Example: 100.33

has_special_price.description: Whether or not the product variant has a special price.

stock_quantity.description: The amount of the product variant total stock quantity. Only updated if the store feature manage product by branches is not activated.

unlimited_quantity.description: Whether or not the product variant is of unlimit quantity.

notify_low.description: Sets a threshold value to trigger notifications when inventory falls below.

barcode.description: The barcode value of product variant.

sku.description: A unique Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) identifier assigned to a specific variant of a product.

mpn.description: Manufacturer Part Number, a unique identifier assigned by a manufacturer to a specific product or component.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number, a unique and standardized identifier used to uniquely represent products, in the global marketplace, to enable efficient tracking and management across supply chains and retail sectors. If `product_type` is set to any of the following: `product`, `group_products`, `codes`, `digital`, `donating` then value can be set. Otherwise, it can be set to `null`

updated_at.description: The date and time product variant is updated.

related_options.description: An array for the related options to this variant.

related_option_values.description: An array for the values of the related options to this variant.

weight.description: The numerical value that represents the mass or weight of a specific variant of a product.

weight_label.description: Product variant weight label representing the type of the weight.

is_user_subscribed_to_sku.description: Whether or not the user subscribed for the sku.

is_default.description: Whether or not enable showing that the product variant is the default

ShippingCompany.description: Detailed structure of the Shipping company model object showing its fields and data types.

id.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific shipping company or carrier. Shipping companies list can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394239)

name.description: The formal name or title of a carrier responsible for the transportation and delivery of goods.

activation_type.description: the method or process by which a shipping company or carrier activates its services, such as whether it's manual or API.

slug.description: A short form identifier for a shipping company's name. If the `activation_type` is set to `manual`, a `null` is returned; otherwise, you will receive a value.

ShipmentBranch.title: ShipmentBranch

id.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific branch. Shipping companies list can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394239)

name.description: The formal name or title of a specific branch.

status.description: Indicates whether a specific branch of an organization is currently active and operational (active) or not in use or temporarily closed (inactive).

is_default.description: Whether or not this brnach is the default branch for all operations.

type.description: The category or classification that defines the nature or function of a specific branch either a branch or warehouse.

id.description: Coupon unique identifier. List of Coupon ID can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394275).

code.description: Coupon code.

type.description: Coupon type.

status.description: Coupon status.

is_apply_with_offer.description: In case the variable is set to `true`, the coupon will be applied with the created offer that has an apply with coupon option activated in the offers; otherwise, it will not be applied.

show_maximum_amount.description: Whether or not to show the coupon's maximum amount

expiry_date.description: Coupon expiry date. Value ***MUST*** be at least one day later than today. Supports two formats, either `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS`

start_date.description: Coupon start date. Supports two formats, either `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS`

free_shipping.description: Whether or not to the coupon includes free shipping

include_product_ids.description: List of included products IDs. List of products can be found [here]https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

exclude_product_ids.description: List of excluded product IDs. List of products ca be found [here]https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

is_sale_products_exclude.description: Whether or not to exclude On-Sale Products

include_category_ids.description: List of included product Category IDs. List of categories can be found [here] (https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207)

exclude_category_ids.description: List of included Category IDs. List of categories can be found [here] (https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207)

include_customer_group_ids.description: List of included Customer Group IDs. List of customer groups can be found [here] (https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394129)

exclude_customer_group_ids.description: List of excluded Customer Group IDs. List of customer groups can be found [here] (https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394129)

exclude_brands_ids.description: List of excluded Brand IDs. List of brands can be found [here] (https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394213)

exclude_shipping_ids.description: List of excluded Shipment Company IDs. Shipping companies list can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394239)

include_customer_ids.description: List of excluded Customer IDs. List of customers can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394121)

include_payment_methods.description: List of included Payment Methods. List of Available Payment Methods can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394164).

applied_in.description: Coupon to be applied at. Value can either `all` or `web` or `app`

is_group.description: Whether or not the Coupon is part of a group of Coupons

group_name.description: Coupon Group Name. `requiredif` `is_group` = `true`; otherwise returns `null` value

group_coupons_count.description: Coupon Group Count.`requiredif` `is_group` = `true`; otherwise returns `null` value

group_coupon_suffix.description: Coupon Group Suffix. `requiredif` `is_group` = `true`; otherwise returns `null` value

code.description: Group Coupon Codes

created_at.description: Date and time of creating the coupon.

timezone_type.description: Coupon Updated Date Timestamp Timezone Type

marketing_active.description: Whether or not the Marketing is active for a certain Coupon

marketing_email.description: Marketer email assoicated to the Coupon. Value may appear if `marketing_acive: true`; otherwise returns `null` value.

marketing_amount.description: The amount due to the marketer. `requiredif` `marketing_active` = `true`; otherwise returns `null` value

marketing_hide_total_sales.description: Whether or not to hide the total sales from the marketer's stastics page. Value may appear if `marketing_acive: true`; otherwise returns `null` value.

marketing_show_maximum_amount.description: Whether or not to show the maximum amount of marketing amount to the marketers. Value may appear if `marketing_acive: true`; otherwise returns `null` value.

marketing_maximum_amount.description: Marketing maximum amount. Value may appear if `marketing_acive: true`; otherwise returns `null` value.

marketing_info.description: Additional notes to the Marketer. Value may appear if `marketing_acive: true`; otherwise returns `null` value.

marketing_visits_count.description: Marketing visit counts. Value may appear if `marketing_acive: true`; otherwise returns `null` value.

marketing_url.description: Marketing URL. Value may appear if `marketing_acive: true`; otherwise returns `null` value.

marketing_statistics_url.description: Marketing statistics URL. value may appear if `marketing_acive: true`; otherwise returns `null` value.

examples: شارع العام، الحي 213729385،, مقابل العود,, الرياض, السعودية

street_number.description: specific part of the shipping or delivery address that typically denotes the numeric value assigned to the recipient's location on a street or road.

block.description: A specific part of the shipping or delivery address that typically denotes the numeric value assigned to the recipient's location on a block.

longitude.description: The longtitu position of the recipient's delivery address on the Earth's surface.

app_id.description: A unique identifier of the shipping application.

meta.description: "Metadata" is data that describes other data, providing details on its creation, format, and context.

id.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific entry or record in a database containing information about a customer's past order or transaction history.

status.description: The current state or condition of an order.

id.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific, user-defined order status.

name.description: User-defined label or name given to a specific order status.

type.description: A user-defined classification or category associated with a custom order status.

slug.description: A unique and user-defined text string associated with a custom order status.

id.description: A customised unique identifier typically associated with the initial status of an order.

name.description: A customised label given to the status of an order when it is first placed in a system.

parent.description: Customised status of a higher-level or overarching status to which specific order is associated to.

note.description: A record or comment associated with a specific order.

created_at.description: POST order history date an time of creation.

name.description: The name or title of a digital file associated with a product.

url.description: A web address or link that points to a specific digital file associated with a product.

id.description: A unique identifier for the shipment. Shipment list can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394232).

order_id.description: A unique identifier for the order associated with the shipment. List of orders can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394146)

order_reference_id.description: This field refers to a reference ID that can be used to look up additional information about the order

external_id.description: A unique identifier for the shipment provided by the external shipping company, used for cross-system reference.

external_additional_id.description: An alternate or supplementary identifier for the shipment, used for additional tracking or internal references.

created_at.description: Date and time of shipment creations.

type.description: Specifies the nature of the shipment, indicating whether it is an outgoing delivery to a customer ("shipment") or a return shipment sent back to the merchant ("return").

courier_id.description: Shipment courier identification. Find a complete list of Shipment companies [here](api-5578809/?nav=01HNA8MH78MVX1S0DRXDHE3A1K)

courier_name.description: The full name of the courier or shipping company responsible for transporting and delivering the shipment to its destination.

courier_logo.description: A URL pointing to the official logo image of the courier or shipping company, which can be used for display in user interfaces or documentation.

external_company_name.description: The name of the external shipping company used for shipments created via the API, if different from the standard courier list.

shipping_number.description: The unique shipping number assigned to the shipment by the courier, used for internal tracking and reference within the courier's system.

tracking_number.description: The unique tracking number provided by the courier, allowing customers and merchants to track the shipment's delivery status online.

pickup_id.description: A unique identifier for the shipment's pickup event, used to reference and manage the pickup process with the courier or logistics provider.

trackable.description: Indicates whether the shipment can be tracked online using a tracking number or link provided by the courier.

tracking_link.description: A direct URL to the courier's online tracking page for this shipment, allowing real-time status updates and location information.

format.description: The file format of the shipment label (e.g., PDF, PNG), which can be used for printing or digital reference.

url.description: A direct URL to download or view the shipment label file, which contains all necessary shipping and tracking information.

label.description: Detailed information about the shipment label, including its file format and a link to access the label.

payment_method.description: Specifies the payment method used for the shipment, such as cash on delivery (cod) or pre-paid, determining how the shipping cost is settled.

source.description: Indicates the origin of the shipment request, such as the dashboard, API, or other system sources.

status.description: Current status of the shipment in the delivery process, such as created, in_progress, delivered, cancelled, etc.

amount.description: The total monetary value of the shipment, representing the sum of all items and services included.

currency.description: The currency code (e.g., SAR, USD) in which the total shipment amount is denominated.

total.description: Details about the total value and currency of the shipment.

amount.description: The amount to be collected from the recipient upon delivery if the payment method is cash on delivery.

currency.description: The currency code (e.g., SAR, USD) for the cash on delivery amount.

cash_on_delivery.description: Details about the cash on delivery amount and its currency.

is_international.description: Indicates whether the shipment is being sent to a destination outside the origin country (international shipping).

value.description: The total weight of the shipment, including all packages, measured in the specified units.

units.description: The unit of measurement for the total weight (e.g., kg, g, lb, oz).

total_weight.description: Information about the total weight of the shipment and its measurement units.

billing_account.description: Indicates which billing account is used for the shipment charges, such as the merchant's own account or a platform account (e.g., Salla).

description.description: A brief summary or explanation of the contents or purpose of the shipment.

remarks.description: Any additional notes, comments, or special delivery instructions related to the shipment.

id.description: The unique identifier of the shipping route.

name.description: The display name of the route assigned to the shipment.

shipping_route.description: The delivery route assigned to a shipping order

service_types.description: A list of service types requested for the shipment, Example: `domestic`,`international`,`normal`, `fulfillment`,`heavy`,`express`,`cash_on_delivery`,`cold`

item_id.description: A unique identifier for the item within the package, used for inventory and tracking purposes.

external_id.description: An external identifier for the item, which may be used by third-party systems or integrations.

name.description: The name or title of the item contained in the package.

sku.description: The Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) code assigned to the item for inventory management.

amount.description: The price of a single unit of the item in the specified currency.

currency.description: The currency code for the item's price (e.g., SAR, USD).

quantity.description: The number of units of the item included in the package.

value.description: The weight of a single unit of the item, measured in the specified units.

units.description: The unit of measurement for the item's weight (e.g., kg, g, lb, oz).

name.description: A label describing a product variation or choice, such as size, color, or material.

values.description: An array of possible values for this product option, each with its own name, value, and price.

packages.description: A list of packages included in the shipment, each containing detailed information about the items, quantities, weights, and options.

A compact 8-character Saudi address code (4 letters + 4 digits), e.g., RHMA3184.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the shipment's origin location, used for mapping and routing.

ship_from.description: Detailed information about the sender or origin location of the shipment, including contact details and address.

A compact 8-character Saudi address code (4 letters + 4 digits), e.g., RHMA3184.
It provides a simplified, precise version of the National Address to speed up delivery and reduce input errors.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the shipment's destination location, used for mapping and routing.

customProperties.description: Each custom key here defines a store-level policy rule such as how many delivery attempts to make or the nature of the shipment contents. The values must be strings.

meta.description: Metadata providing additional context about the shipment, such as the originating application and policy options.

Pagination2.title: Pagination
Pagination2.description: For a better response behavior as well as maintain the best security level, All retrieving API endpoints use a mechanism to retrieve data in chunks called pagination.  Pagination working by return only a specific number of records in each response, and through passing the page number you can navigate the different pages.
