preparation_time.description: The time required to get an order ready for shipping or picked up.

sunday.description: The day of the week when the branch is open. Values are: `sunday`, `monday`, `tuesday`, `wednesday`, `thursday`, `friday`, `saturday`

enabled.description: The option to enable the days as working day.

from.description: The beginning of the branch's working hours.

to.description: The conclusion of the branch's working hours.

working_hours.description: The hours where the branch is operating, it will be required if the `type` is branch.

type.description: Indicates the type of DNS record, such as the available enum ones

name.description: Specifies the domain or subdomain to which the DNS record applies.

value.description: Refers to the data associated with a specific DNS record.

priority.description: This is typically used for MX records to specify the order in which mail servers should be tried. Required if `type = MX`

order_id.description: Order ID. List of Order IDs can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394146)

type.description: Invoice Type. **Note** that you cannot create a `credit_note` invoice type before creating a `tax_invoice` type

url.description: URL Link to the `PDF` file. The variable is `requiredif` `data_type` is `url`.

invoice_number.description: Invoice Number. The variable is `requiredif` `data_type` is `data`.

sub_total.description: Invoice Subtotal Cost. The variable is `requiredif` `data_type` is `data`.

total.description: Invoice Total Cost. The variable is `requiredif` `data_type` is `data`.

shipping_cost.description: Invoice Shipping Cost. The variable is `requiredif` `data_type` is `data`.

cash_on_delivery_cost.description: Invoice COD Cost. The variable is `requiredif` `data_type` is `data`.

tax.description: Tax Cost Percentage. The variable is `requiredif` `data_type` is `data`.

tax_value.description: Tax Value Cost. The variable is `requiredif` `data_type` is `data`.

mobile.description: The numerical contact information belonging to a customer that allows communication via telephone, without country code.

mobile_code_country.description: The numeric prefix indicating a customer's country for mobile communication.

email.description: Email address of the customer used for electronic communication.

gender.description: The categorization of an individual as male, female, based on their  biologically determined characteristics.

groups.description: A unique identifier for a group to which a customer belongs.

name.description: The unique name or label associated with a specific company, manufacturer, or producer of products or services. 🌐 [Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122)

logo.description: Brand logo (string or file) is the visual representation of a brand, either in the form of an image or a file, with recommended dimensions typically set at 100x80** pixels

banner.description: A text-based representation or URL link that directs to an image file, used as a visual symbol to identify and represent a brand on a webpage or platform.

description.description: Brand description is a brief overview that highlights key attributes, values, and qualities associated with a particular manufacturer or company, providing insights into its identity and offerings. 🌐 [Support multi-language](docs/1.%20Introduction/1.6.Multi-Language-Support.md)

metadata_title.description: Metadata Title which is a concise label used to optimize search engine results and enhance the visibility of a Brand page. [🌐Support multi-language](doc-421122)

metadata_description.description: SEO Metadata Description:Concise content enhancing search visibility and social sharing.  🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

metadata_url.description: SEO Metadata URL: Web link for enhanced search engine visibility and social media sharing.  🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

title.description: Metadata Title which is a concise label used to optimize search engine results and enhance the visibility of a Brand page. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

description.description: SEO Metadata Description:Concise content enhancing search visibility and social sharing.  🌐 [doc-421122)

url.description: SEO Metadata URL: Web link for enhanced search engine visibility and social media sharing.  🌐 [doc-421122)

translations.description: Brand translations are based on the store's enabled language locale. For instance, if the store supports both Arabic and English, the `translations` object will return two entries: `ar` for Arabic and `en` for English.

parent_id.description: Order Status Parent ID. List of Order Statuses can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394150)

name.description: Order Status Name.

message.description: Order Status Message.

sort.description: Order Status Sort.

is_active.description: Whether or not the Order Status is active.

name.description: Order Status Name. List of Order Statuses can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394150). 🌐 [Support multi-language]([🌐Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122))

message.description: Order Status Message. 🌐 [Support multi-language]([🌐Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122))

sort.description: Order Status Sort.

is_active.description: Whether or not the Order Status is active.

shipment_number.description: A unique identifier for the shipment that distinguishes it from other shipments.

order_id.description: The order ID that the shipment will be assigned, list of orders can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394146).

tracking_number.description: A unique identifier for the tracking information associated with the shipment.

tracking_link.description: A URL that provides a link to the tracking information for the shipment.

status.description:
The current status of the shipment.

:::danger[]
Effective January 20th, 2025, the status variable will be a **required** field in the request payload.

pdf_label.description: A PDF label that contains information about the shipment, such as the sender's and recipient's address, tracking number, and other relevant details.

cost.description: The actual cost of the shipment that the Merchant will be charged for, which is calculated per the shipping company's actual costs. Ensure to include VAT in the cost.

status_note.description: The note field provides additional shipment information relevant factors, as it is used to clarify the shipment status and provide context.
examples: Parcel has been picked up by our logistics partner

external_company_name.description: The name of the shipping company for shipments created via the API

policy_options.description: Custom shipment policy details. Each key represents a policy option (e.g. number_of_boxes, shipment_content_type), and the value is a string. This allows flexibility for any store-defined policy.

customProperties.description: Each custom key here defines a store-level policy rule such as how many delivery attempts to make or the nature of the shipment contents. The values must be strings.

name.description: A distinctive label or title assigned to a specific item or commodity, serving as an identifier and often conveying essential information about the product.

required.description: Whether or not the product option is required.

visibility_condition_type.description: Visibility condition type. Required if the `visibility` variable is set to `on_condition`

visibility_condition_option.description: The product option's ID for the condition. Required if the variable `visibility` is set to `on_condition`.

visibility_condition_value.description: The product option value's ID for the condition. Required if the variable `visibility` is set to `on_condition`

display_type.description: The various choices or variations of a product are visually presented to customers, typically categorized as text, image, or color representations.

name.description: A descriptive label or title given to a specific attribute, feature, or characteristic associated with a product, helping to define and differentiate its various qualities or options.

price.description: The additional price which will be added to the product price when the customer adds/selects this value. Alternatively the value is set 0 if there is no additional price.

quantity.description: The specific quantity or number of units available for a particular option or variation of a product.

display_value.description: The display value in UI based on display type of option, by default will use the name of value as display value when the 'display_value=text', but in case you used 'image' then you need to set the image id as value You can upload a new image to product using attach image endpoint then use 'image' id from response, otherwise when use 'color' as display type you need to pass the color for example '#000' for black color

is_default.description: The option to indicate if this value is the default value of the product option.

name.description: The title or label assigned to a specific grouping or classification of items, products, or content, often used to organize and categorize them for easier navigation or identification. 🌐 [Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122)

status.description: The status of the category, whether or not it is `active` or `hidden`

metadata_title.description: Category SEO Metadata Title which is a concise label used to optimize search engine results and enhance the visibility of a category page.

metadata_description.description: A succinct summary crafted to enhance search engine optimization and spotlight a brand's attributes within a category.

metadata_url.description: Metadata URL is a web address that contains information designed to improve a webpage's search engine visibility and shareability on social platforms.

shows_in.description: Category channels that will be displayed to them

name.description: Translated category name

title.description: Translated Category SEO Metadata Title which is a concise label used to optimize search engine results and enhance the visibility of a category page.

description.description: A succinct summary crafted to enhance search engine optimization and spotlight a brand's attributes within a Translated category.

url.description: Translated Metadata URL is a web address that contains information designed to improve a webpage's search engine visibility and shareability on social platforms.

translations.description: Category translations are based on the store's enabled language locale. For instance, if the store supports both Arabic and English, the `translations` object will return two entries: `ar` for Arabic and `en` for English.

parent_id.description: A unique identifier that references the parent or higher-level category to which a specific category belongs, establishing a hierarchical relationship within a categorization system.

sort_order.description: Sort order dictates the sequence or arrangement of categories when displayed to users. It determines the order in which categories are presented, often using numerical values to assign priority, allowing for controlled and organized navigation.

id.description: Product ID. Get a list of Product IDs from [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168)

sort.description: an Integer number signifying the sort order of the product inside the category

products.description: Assign products and specify the sort order.

overwrite_exists_pending.description: Whether or not to allow the pending shipment, which was generated during the order creation, to be replace by the new shipment that is assigned by the Order Management App

courier_id.description: Shipment Courier ID. List of Shipment companies can be found [here](api-5394239.

order_id.description: The order ID that the shipment will be assigned, list of orders can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394146).

shipment_id.description: The unique identifier of the shipment. Required if shipment_type is set to 'return'.

currency.description: Shipment Cash On Delivery Currency. You may refer to the external Merchant API Docs of the List of Currencies [here](https://docs.salla.dev/5394257e0)

description.description: A brief summary or explanation of the contents or purpose of the shipment.

remarks.description: Any additional notes, comments, or special delivery instructions related to the shipment.

external_id.description: A unique identifier for the shipment provided by the external shipping company, used for cross-system reference.

external_additional_id.description: An alternate or supplementary identifier for the shipment, used for additional tracking or internal references.

external_company_name.description: The name of the external shipping company used for shipments created via the API, if different from the standard courier list.

service_types.description: A list of service types requested for the shipment, Example: `domestic`,`international`,`normal`, `fulfillment`,`heavy`,`express`,`cash_on_delivery`,`cold`

policy_options.description: Custom shipment policy details. Each key represents a policy option (e.g. number_of_boxes, shipment_content_type), and the value is a string. This allows flexibility for any store-defined policy.

customProperties.description: Each custom key here defines a store-level policy rule such as how many delivery attempts to make or the nature of the shipment contents. The values must be strings.

name.description: The name of the recipient or destination contact person for the shipment.

email.description: The email address of the recipient or destination contact.

phone.description: The phone number of the recipient or destination contact.

country.description: The country to which the shipment is being sent. Use the country code or ID as specified in the country list [here](api-5394228).

city.description: The city to which the shipment is being sent. Use the city name or ID as specified in the city list [here](api-5394230).

address_line.description: The street address or location details for the shipment's destination.

street_number.description: The street number for the shipment's destination address.

block.description: The block or building identifier for the shipment's destination address.

short_address.description:
A compact 8-character Saudi address code (4 letters + 4 digits), e.g., RHMA3184.
It provides a simplified, precise version of the National Address to speed up delivery and reduce input errors. This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA).

building_number.description: The National Address building number associated with the location.This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA)

additional_number.description: An additional National Address identifier used for more precise location specification.This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA).

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code for the shipment's destination address. This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA).

country_id.description:
Country ID.
:::danger[]
This is a deprecated variable. Instead, use the `ship_to.country` variable.
:::

city_id.description:
City ID. 

:::danger[]
This is a deprecated variable. Instead, use the `ship_to.city` variable.
:::

lat.description: The latitude coordinate of the shipment's destination location, used for mapping and routing.

lng.description: The longitude coordinate of the shipment's destination location, used for mapping and routing.

geo_coordinates.description: Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) for the shipment's destination address.

ship_to.description: Detailed information about the recipient or destination location of the shipment, including contact details and address.

type.description: Specifies the type of origin for the shipment, such as an address or branch location.

branch_id.description: The unique identifier for the branch or facility from which the shipment is sent, required when the type is 'branch'.

name.description: The name of the sender or origin contact person for the shipment.

email.description: The email address of the sender or origin contact.

phone.description: The phone number of the sender or origin contact.

country.description: The country from which the shipment is being sent. Use the country code or ID as specified in the country list [here](api-5394228).

city.description: The city from which the shipment is being sent. Use the city name or ID as specified in the city list [here](api-5394230).

address_line.description: The street address or location details for the shipment's origin.

street_number.description: The street number for the shipment's origin address.

block.description: The block or building identifier for the shipment's origin address.

short_address.description:
A compact 8-character Saudi address code (4 letters + 4 digits), e.g., RHMA3184.
It provides a simplified, precise version of the National Address to speed up delivery and reduce input errors.This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA) and `type` is `address`.

building_number.description: An additional National Address identifier used for more precise location specification. This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA) and `type` is `address`.

additional_number.description: An additional National Address identifier used for more precise location specification. This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA)

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code for the shipment's origin address. This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA) and `type` is `address`.

country_id.description:
Country ID. 

:::danger[]
This is a deprecated variable. Instead, use the `ship_from.country` variable.
:::

city_id.description:
City ID. 

:::danger[]
This is a deprecated variable. Instead, use the `ship_from.city` variable.
:::

lat.description: The latitude coordinate of the shipment's origin location, used for mapping and routing.

lng.description: The longitude coordinate of the shipment's origin location, used for mapping and routing.

geo_coordinates.description: Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) for the shipment's origin address.

ship_from.description: Detailed information about the sender or origin location of the shipment, including contact details and address.

external_id.description: An external identifier for the item, which may be used by third-party systems or integrations.

name.description: The name or title of the item contained in the package.

sku.description: The Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) code assigned to the item for inventory management.

amount.description: The price of a single unit of the item in the specified currency.

currency.description: The currency code for the item's price (e.g., SAR, USD). You may refer to the external Merchant API Docs for the list of currencies [here](api-5394257).

price.description: Details about the price of the item, including amount and currency.

quantity.description: The number of units of the item included in the package.

value.description: The weight of a single unit of the item, measured in the specified units.

units.description: The unit of measurement for the item's weight (e.g., kg, g, lb, oz).

weight.description: Details about the weight of the item, including value and units.

packages.description: A list of packages included in the shipment, each containing detailed information about the items, quantities, weights, and options.

quantity.description: The numerical value representing the number of units or items of a specific product available, `required if` the variable `unlimited_quantity` is `= false`

mode.description: Mode of quantity update; one of the allowed enum values.

unlimited_quantity.description: Option to indicate the product is of unlimited quantity.

branches_quantities.description: The branch quantities object is required if the store installed an App developed called [`Retail Store | متاجر التجزئة`](https://apps.salla.sa/en/app/503213483)

id.description: Branch Quantities' Quantity ID, a unique numeric or alpanumeric code to be associated with the quantity.

quantity.description: Branch quantities quantity value

tracking_link.description: A hyperlink or URL that allows access to a  platform to monitor and track the status and location of orders in real-time as they move through the shipping and delivery process.

shipment_number.description: Order Shipment number (order number), a unique identifier assigned to a specific order.

shipment_type.description: Indicates whether a particular order represents a `shipment`, meaning it's being sent to the customer, or a `return`, indicating that it's a product being sent back to the seller or retailer.

cost.description: The final actual cost of the shipment, which is calculated as per the shipping company's actual costs. Ensure to include VAT in the cost.

name.description: A descriptive label or title given to a specific attribute, feature, or characteristic associated with a product, helping to define and differentiate its various qualities or options.

price.description: The additional price which will be added to the product price when the customer adds/selects this value. Alternatively the value is set 0 if there is no additional price.

quantity.description: The specific quantity or number of units available for a particular option or variation of a product.

display_value.description: The display value in UI based on display type of option, by default will use the name of value as display value when the 'display_value=text', but in case you used 'image' then you need to set the image id as value You can upload a new image to product using attach image endpoint then use 'image' id from response, otherwise when use 'color' as display type you need to pass the color for example '#000' for black color

is_default.description: The option to indicate if this value is the default value of the product option.

video_url.description: A web address that links to a specific video file or content on the interne. | required

default.description: Set the video thumbnail image as default for product.

alt.description: Alternative description for the video thumbnail image to enhance SEO.

name.description: Webhook name. List of Webhook names can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394135).

event.description: Webhook event. List of events can be found [here](doc-421119), you can use one from the list.

url.description: Webhook URL.

version.description: Version of the webhook; either valued as `1` or `2`.

rule.description: Operations, expressions and conditions to your webhook. For example, you may use `=`,`!=`,`AND`,`OR` etc in such a menner: `payment_method = YOUR_PAYMENT_METHOD` or in combination `company_id = 871291 OR price < 50`. That adds more capbility to filter the response based on conditions

key.description: Any header key, which its value is sent in the post request to the webhook URL

value.description: The value sent to the webhook; for example: `cf-ray: 669af54ecf55dfcb-FRA`

code.description: Coupon Code.

type.description: Coupon Type.

amount.description: Coupon Amount. Required if the variable `type` is updated.

status.description: Coupon Status.

start_date.description: Coupon Start Date. Supports two formats, either `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS`

expiry_date.description: Coupon Expiry Date. The value of this variable cannot be any date before the `start_date` variable . Supports two formats, either `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS`

applied_in.description: Coupon to be applied at. Value can either `all` or `web` or `app`

free_shipping.description: Whether or not the coupon include free shipping

exclude_sale_products.description: Whether or not the coupon exclude on-sale products

show_maximum_amount.description: Whether or not to show the maximum amount of the coupon

marketing_show_maximum_amount.description: Whether or not to show the marketing maximum amount of the coupon to the marketer

marketing_active.description: Whether or not the coupon include a marketer

marketing_hide_total_sales.description: Whether or not hide total sales

marketing_maximum_amount.description: Marketing Maximum Amount Value. required-if marketing_active = true

products_include.description: List of Included Products in the Coupon. List of products can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

products_exclude.description: List of Excluded Products in the Coupon. List of products can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

list_include_categories.description: List of Included Categories in the Coupon. List of categories can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207).

list_exclude_categories.description: List of Excluded Categories. List of categories can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207).

list_exclude_brands.description: List of Excluded Brands. List of brands can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394213).

list_include_groups.description: List of Included Customer Groups. List of customers can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394121).

list_exclude_groups.description: List of Excluded Customer Groups. List of customers can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394121).

list_exclude_shipping.description: List of Excluded Shipping Companies. List of Shipping companies can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394239).

payment_methods.description: List of Included Payment Methods. Available payment methods can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394164).

name.description: The designated title or label assigned to a particular product. 🌐 [Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/421122m0)

price.description: The price of the product.

status.description: The current condition or state of a product, indicating whether it is available for sale, out of stock, hidden, deleted. List of Product Statuses can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394150).

quantity.description: Quantity of the product. Will be skippped if unlimted_quantity=true

location.description: The specific place or venue where a booking or reservation is made, such as a hotel, restaurant, event venue, or transportation service.

type.description: Refers to the category or classification of a reservation or booking, indicating the nature or purpose of the booking. Required if `booking_details != null`

session_duration.description: Booking duration is mandatory when the booking type is set as `date_time`. Required if `type = date_time`

session_gap.description: Booking session gap is necessary when the booking type is `date_time`, and it specifies the amount of time between consecutive booking sessions or appointments. Required if `type = date_time`

session_count.description: Booking Sessions Count, which is the number of sessions allowed for one customer. Required if `booking_details != null`

time_strict_value.description: A timeframe where it is not applicable to make reservations.

time_strict_type.description: The restriction on making bookings within a specific timeframe is measured in minutes, hours, or days.

day.description: Days which are available for booking.

from.description: The starting time of the available booking slot in 24-hour format. Required if `booking_details.type = date_time`.

to.description: The ending time of the available booking slot in 24-hour format. Required if `booking_details.type = date_time`.

overrides.description: Overwrite availability for a particular day, on a particular date

day.description: The value of specific date that has been overridden in a booking

unlimited_quantity.description: Option to indicate the product is of unlimited quantity.

description.description: A product description provides detailed information about an item, helping customers understand its features, benefits, and intended use. 🌐 [Support multi-language](docs/1.%20Introduction/1.6.Multi-Language-Support.md)

categories.description: A list of categories IDs, that will be associate with the product. List of Categories ID can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207).

sale_price.description: The sale price of the product.

cost_price.description: Product cost price, the amount a business pays to acquire or manufacture a product before any additional expenses, such as overhead or markup, are applied

sale_end.description: The date when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to expire.

sale_start.description: The date when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to start.

require_shipping.description: determent if the product require shipping or not.

maximum_quantity_per_order.description: Maximum product quantity for each order.

weight.description: The weight of the product represented in numerical form if applicable.

weight_type.description: The classification or unit of measurement used to specify the weight of an object or item, such as kilograms (kg), pounds (lb), ounces (oz), or grams (g).

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit is a unique alphanumeric code used to identify and manage specific products within a company's inventory. The Product SKU. List of Product SKU can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

mpn.description: Manufacturer Part Number, a unique identifier assigned by a manufacturer to a specific product or component, which helps distinguish it from other similar products and facilitates inventory management, product tracking, and ordering processes.

gtin.description: "Global Trade Item Number" (GTIN), a unique and standardized identifier used to uniquely represent products, items, or services in the global marketplace, to enable efficient tracking and management across supply chains and retail sectors.

with_tax.description: The option to indicate that the product price includes tax or not.

hide_quantity.description: The option to hide product quantity.

show_in_web.description: The option  change the product's status to `hidden` if set to `true` or `sale` if set to `false`

channels.description: The product to appear in specific channels

enable_upload_image.description: To enable upload image for the product when the customer add it to cart.

enable_note.description: To enable add note for the product when customer add it to cart.

pinned.description: The option to enable pinning product in categories page.

active_advance.description: Option to activate advance product details.

subtitle.description: Subtitle of the product will display under product name in pages.

promotion_title.description: A label to display in the main image. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

promotion_subtitle.description: A sublabel to display in the main image. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

metadata_title.description: Product de SEO Metadata Title which is a concise label used to optimize search engine results and enhance the visibility of a product details page. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

metadata_description.description: The page description for product will display in search engine results. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

metadata_url.description: The page url for product will display in search engine results. 🌐 [Support multi-language](doc-421122)

scope_id.description: Refers to the id of the scope/market, as of now you can get it from merchant dashboard.

price.description: The price of the product.

cost_price.description: Product cost price, the amount a business pays to acquire or manufacture a product before any additional expenses, such as overhead or markup, are applied

sale_price.description: The sale price of the product.

sale_end.description: The date when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to expire.

sale_start.description: The date when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to start.

scoped_prices.description: Will contain the prices details that related to the store markets/scopes

brand_id.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific brand or manufacturer. List of Brand IDs can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394213).

tags.description: Labels or markers applied to product listings or entries to indicate that they have been recently updated, check tags sections for more details. List of Product Tags can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394180).

company.description: Unique identification number assigned to a zone, list of shipping companies can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394239).

country.description: Unique identification number assigned to Shipping Country. If you ship to all countries, ensure that you set the value to `-1`.  List of countries can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394228).

city.description: Unique identification number assigned to Shipping City. If you ship to all cities, ensure that you set the value to `-1`.  List of cities can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394230).

cities_excluded.description: Excluded Cities from Shipping. List of cities can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394230).

cash_on_delivery.description: Excluded City Name in English. List of cities can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394230).

status.description: Whether or not Cash On Delivery (COD) is activated

type.description: Fees Type

up_to_weight.description: Maximum Allowed Weight. `requiredif` `type` is set to `rate`

amount_per_unit.description: Amount Per Unit. `requiredif` `type` is set to `rate`

per_unit.description: Per Unit Value. `requiredif` `type` is set to `rate`

tax.description: The Tax rate, the percentage at which a tax is levied on a product or transaction, representing the portion of the total amount that must be paid as tax.

country_id.description: A unique identifier associated with a specific country, and it can be set as null or left blank to indicate that the tax rate is intended to apply to all countries. List of countries can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394228).

code.description: Coupon Code. List Coupons Code can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394275).

type.description: Coupon Type.

status.description: Coupon Status.

start_date.description: Coupon Start Date. Supports two formats, either `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS`

expiry_date.description: Coupon Expiry Date. Value ***MUST*** be at least one day later than today. Supports two formats, either `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS`

applied_in.description: Coupon to be applied at. Value can either `all` or `web` or `app`

is_group.description: Whether or not the Coupon is of type `Group`.

is_apply_with_offer.description: In case the variable is set to `true`, the coupon will be applied with the created offer that has an apply with coupon option activated in the offers; otherwise, it will not be applied.

group_suffix.description: Group Name Suffix. `requiredif` `is_group` value is `true`. No spaces/numbers are allowed

maximum_amount.description: Coupon Maximum Amount. `requiredif` type is set to `percentage`

free_shipping.description: Whether or not the coupon include free shipping

exclude_sale_products.description: Whether or not the coupon exclude on-sale products

show_maximum_amount.description: Whether or not to show the maximum amount of the coupon

marketing_show_maximum_amount.description: Whether or not to show the marketing maximum amount of the coupon to the marketer

marketing_active.description: Whether or not the coupon include a marketer

marketing_hide_total_sales.description: Whether or not hide total sales.

products_include.description: List of Included Products in the Coupon. List of products can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

list_include_categories.description: List of Included Categories in the Coupon. List of categories can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207).

products_exclude.description: List of Excluded Products in the Coupon. List of products can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

list_exclude_categories.description: List of Excluded Categories. List of categories can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207).

list_exclude_brands.description: List of Excluded Brands. List of brands can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394213).

list_include_groups.description: List of Included Customer Groups. List of customers can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394121).

list_exclude_groups.description: List of Excluded Customer Groups. List of customers can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394121).

list_exclude_shipping.description: List of Excluded Shipping Companies. List of shipping companies can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394239)

payment_methods.description: List of Included Payment Methods. List of available payment methods can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394164).

name.description: The title or label used to identify a specific promotional or discounted offer. 🌐 [Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122)

message.description: A brief statement or communication that conveys the details or benefits of a specific promotional or discount offer. 🌐 [Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122)

applied_channel.description: The specific platforms, channels, or methods through which a promotional or special offer is made available or applied.

offer_type.description: The category or nature of a particular promotional or discount offer, such as buy-x get-y.

applied_to.description: The specific products, services, or items to which a particular promotional or discount offer is intended or allowed to be used or applied, specifying what the offer covers within a product or service catalog.

start_date.description:
The date on which a promotional or discount offer start, before which it is not permitted to take advantage of the offer's benefits.

**Ensure to follow on the format of the date.**

expiry_date.description:
The date on which a promotional or discount offer expires or becomes no longer valid, after which it is not permitted to take advantage of the offer's benefits.

**Ensure to follow on the format of the date.**

min_purchase_amount.description: The total minimum order amount to be purchased for this offer to be activated

min_items_count.description: The minimum order items count to activate this offer.

buy.description: Specifics on items required for offer eligibility.

type.description: Product Type to buy to be eligible for the special offer. Required if `offer_type = buy_x_get_y`

quantity.description: Product Quantity to buy to be eligible for the special offer. Required if `offer_type = buy_x_get_y`

products.description: The Products to be purchased that are included in the special offer. Make sure to pass the Product IDs in an array. This field is mandatory when `buy.type` is set to `product`.

categories.description: The Categories included in the special offer. Make sure to pass the Category IDs in an array. This field is mandatory when `buy.type` is set to `category`.

get.description: Specifics of the offer.

type.description: The type of the offer.

discount_type.description: Discount Type to get if eligible for the special offer. Required if `offer_type = buy_x_get_y`

quantity.description: Product Quantity to get if eligible for the special offer. Required if `offer_type = buy_x_get_y`

products.description: The Products to get if eligible for the special offer that are included in the special offer. Make sure to pass the Product IDs in an array. This field is mandatory when `get.type` is set to `product`.

categories.description: The Categories included in the special offer. Make sure to pass the Product IDs in an array. This field is mandatory when `get.type` is set to `category`.

price.description: Required if the offer type is `special_price`. Specifies the special price that the customer will get with the offer (tax exclusive).

quantity.description: Required if the offer type is `special_price`. Specifies the quantity that must be added to the cart for the offer to apply.

scopes_ids.description: Specifies the scopes ids for the markets which the offer applies to

countries.description: A list of customer countries that the offer applies to.

select_by.description: Required if `countries` array is provided. Specifies whether the customer country should be determined based on `mobile`, `shipping` or `ip`

customer_groups.description: A list of customer groups which the offer applies to.

applied_with_coupon.description: Whether or not the offer should be applied with a valid coupon

items.description: Category IDs. Get a list of Category IDs from [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207)
Product IDs. Get a list of Product IDs from [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168)

quantity.description: Quantity to buy

discounts_table.description: Tiered discount in the special offer. Required if `offer_type` is `discounts_table`

condition_threshold.description: Minimum total purchase required to apply the offer, order_amount value or products_count value

max_customer_discount.description: Required if `discount_apply_type` is percentage. Specifies the maximum discount amount per customer.

discount_amount.description: The discount amount depending on the `discount_apply_type` it can represent a percentage or a fixed amount.

message.description: A brief statement or communication that conveys the details or benefits of a specific promotional or discount offer. 🌐 [Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122)

min_purchases.description: The minimum value to apply the discount

type.description: Type of dicount whether its percentage or fixed

with_current_cart.description: Specifies whether the current cart value should be included in the calculation

applied_with_coupon.description: Whether or not the offer should be applied with a valid coupon

exclude_sale_products.description: Specifies whether the offer should be applied to sale products or not

excluded_buy_products_ids.description: Array of product Ids execluded from the offer. Get a list of product ids [here](https://docs.salla.dev/5394168e0)

excluded_buy_categories_ids.description: Array of category Ids execluded from the offer

title.description: SEO Title.  🌐 [Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122)

description.description: SEO Description. 🌐 [Support multi-language](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-421122)

url.description: Sitemap URL.

friendly_urls_status.description: Whether or not the SEO enabled for friendly URLS .

refersh_sitemap.description: Whether or not to refresh the sitemap.

name.description: A unique title or label assigned to a collection of items, individuals, or entities that share common characteristics, serving as a means of categorization or identification within a broader context or organization. List of customers can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394121).

conditions.description: An array of conditions to consider when automatically assigning customers to a group.

type.description: The type of the condition.

value.description: A condition value (value to be after the operator).

min_value.description: Refers to the minimum possible value. Required if `symbol` equals `between`.

max_value.description: Refers to the maximum possible value. Required if `symbol` equals `between`

name.description: A distinctive label or title assigned to a specific item or commodity, serving as an identifier and often conveying essential information about the product.

type.description: Product option field type

display_type.description: The various choices or variations of a product are visually presented to customers, typically categorized as text, image, or color representations.

visibility_condition_type.description: Visibility condition type. Required if the `visibility` variable is set to `on_condition`

visibility_condition_option.description: The product option's ID for the condition	. Required if the variable `visibility` is set to `on_condition`

visibility_condition_value.description: The product option value's ID for the condition. Required if the variable `visibility` is set to `on_condition`

sort.description: The sort order of the product option

advance.description: Whether or not the product has variants. If the product is of type `product`, then adding an option to the product will set it to `advance`. Default value is `true` when the product type is set to `product`

associated_with_order_time.description: Only works when the variable `type` is set to `date`

not_same_day_order.description: Only works when the variable `type` is set to `date`

values.description: Product Option values. Required if the variable `type` is set to either `radio`, `file`, or `checkbox`

name.description: A descriptive label or title given to a specific attribute, feature, or characteristic associated with a product, helping to define and differentiate its various qualities or options.

price.description:
The additional price which will be added to the product price when the customer adds/selects this value. Alternatively the value is set 0 if there is no additional price. 
Note: Cannot be included for phyical products

display_value.description: The display value in UI based on display type of option, by default will use the name of value as display value when the 'display_value=text', but in case you used 'image' then you need to set the image id as value You can upload a new image to product using attach image endpoint then use 'image' id from response, otherwise when use 'color' as display type you need to pass the color for example '#000' for black color. More about attaching an image from [here](api-5394187)

payment_method.description: The various methods of payment that are accessible or offered to a specific group of customers.  List of available payment methods can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394164).

shipping.description: The various delivery options or methods that are accessible or offered to a specific group of customers.

name.description: A Product Name is a succinct label for a specific item, aiding in easy identification and categorization within a product listing.

price.description: Product price is the specified cost assigned to a particular item, determining its value in a commercial transaction.

status.description: Product status refers to the current condition or state of availability of a particular item within a product catalog or inventory. Available values 'hidden','sale','out'.

product_type.description: Product type categorizes items based on shared attributes or characteristics, aiding in effective organization and search within a product inventory. Available values are, 'product', 'service', 'group_products', 'codes', 'digital', 'food', and 'donating'

quantity.description: Product quantity indicates the numerical count of a specific item available in inventory, representing its availability for sale or distribution.

location.description: The specific place or site where a reservation or booking is made.

type.description: Booking Type. Required if `booking_details != null`

session_duration.description: The length of time that a particular session. Required if `type = date_`

session_gap.description: The period of time between two consecutive sessions or events, indicating the duration between the end of one session and the start of the next.. Required if `type = date_time`

session_count.description: Booking Sessions Count, which is the number of sessions allowed for one customer . Required if `booking_details != null`

time_strict_value.description: A timeframe where it is not applicable to make reservations.

time_strict_type.description: The restriction on making bookings within a specific timeframe is measured in minutes, hours, or days.

day.description: Days which are available for booking.

from.description: The starting time of the of available booking slot in 24 hours format. Required if `booking_details.type = date_time`

to.description: The ending time of the of available booking slot in 24 hours format. Required if `booking_details.type = date_time`

overrides.description: Overwrite availability for a particular day, on a particular date

unlimited_quantity.description: Option to indicate the product is of unlimited quantity.

description.description: A product description provides detailed information about an item, helping customers understand its features, benefits, and intended use.

categories.description: A list of categories ID's, that will be associated with the product.

cost_price.description: Product cost price, the amount a business pays to acquire or manufacture a product before any additional expenses, such as overhead or markup, are applied.

sale_end.description: The date when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to expire.

sale_start.description: The date when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to start.

require_shipping.description: Require shipping indicates whether the product necessitates a physical delivery process or can be provided digitally without shipping.

maximum_quantity_per_order.description: Maximum quantity per order for the customer or the maximum quantity for the product.

weight.description: The weight of the product represented in numerical form if applicable.

videos.description: As well as a single video as mentioned above, It also can be list of videos

sku.description: Sku of the product.

gtin.description:
Global Trade Item Number. If `product_type` is set to any of the following:  `product`, `group_products`, `codes`, `digital`, `donating`
then value can be set. Otherwise, it can be set to `null`

calories.description: Calories Value. If `product_type` is set to`food`, value can bet set. Otherwise, it can be set to `null`

hide_quantity.description: weather to hide the quantity or not.

show_in_web.description: Whether or not to change the product's status to `hidden` if set to `true` or `sale` if set to `false`

enable_upload_image.description: To enable upload image for the product when the customer add it to cart.

enable_note.description: To enable add note for the product when customer add it to cart.

pinned.description: if you want pinned the product in categories page.

active_advance.description: if you want to activate product advanced option.

subtitle.description: Subtitle of the product will display under product name in pages.

promotion_title.description: A label to display in the main image.

promotion_subtitle.description: A sublabel to display in the main image.

metadata_title.description: The page title for product will display in search engine results.

metadata_description.description: The page description for product will display in search engine results.

metadata_url.description: The page url for product will display in search engine results.

scope_id.description: Refers to the id of the scope/market, as of now you can get it from merchant dashboard.

price.description: The price of the product.

cost_price.description: Product cost price, the amount a business pays to acquire or manufacture a product before any additional expenses, such as overhead or markup, are applied

sale_price.description: The sale price of the product.

sale_end.description: The date when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to expire.

sale_start.description: The date when a promotional sale or discount on a product is scheduled to start.

scoped_prices.description: Will contain the prices details that related to the store markets/scopes

tags.description: The tag ids, check tags sections for more details.

consisted_products.description: The Product is under a Group of Products

id.description: Consisted Product ID

quantity.description: Consisted Product Quantity

default.description: Whether or not the image is the default one for the product

sort.description: Image's position in a list of other images within the product starting from the sort number 1.

images.description: We overide the currently attached images and replace them with the newly added ones for this product.

channels.description: The product to appear in specific channels

customer_id.description: The customer ID. The person who placed the order. `requiredIf` the receiver details is `null`. List of customers can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394121).

receiver.description: The receiver of the order. `requiredif` the `customer_id` is `null`

name.description: The full name of the receiver. `requiredif` the `customer_id` is `null`

country_code.description: The country code of the receiver. `requiredif` the `customer_id` is `null`. Fetch a list of country codes using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/5394228e0) endpoint.

phone.description: The phone number of the receiver **without** `country_prefix`. `requiredif` the `customer_id` is `null`.

country_prefix.description: The phone code country of the receiver. `requiredif` the `customer_id` is `null`

email.description: The email address of the receiver. `requiredif` the `customer_id` is `null`

notify.description: Whether or not to send order updates to the receiver.

shipping_address.description: The shipping address details of the order

branch_id.description: The Branch ID if the order is required to be picked up from a branch.

country_id.description: The ID of the country. `requiredIf` the `shipping_address.branch_id` is `null`. Fetch a list of countries using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/5394228e0) endpoint.

city_id.description: The City ID. `requiredIf` the `shipping_address.branch_id` is `null`. Fetch a list of cities using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/5394230e0).

street_number.description: The shipping street number. `requiredIf` the `shipping_address.branch_id` is `null`.

geocode.description: The Latitude and Longitude of shipping location `requiredIf` the `shipping_address.branch_id` is `null`.

payment.description: The payment details of the order.

status.description: the current condition or state of a payment for a product or service, indicating whether the payment has been `paid`,`waiting`, or has encountered any specific status during the transaction process

method.description: The payment method.`requiredIf` the `payment.status` is `paid`. Fetch a list of available payment methods using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/5394164e0) endpoint, and use the `slug` variable.

accepted_methods.description: Payment accepted methods. `requiredIf` the `payment.status` is `waiting`. Fetch a list of available payment methods using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/5394164e0) endpoint and use the `slug` variable.

products.description:
A list of products, that will be shipped. Using the `id`, you can pass an existing product, or you can create a custom product by passing the `name` and `price`.

Available product attributes:

| Variable Name | Type    | Description                                                    |
| ------------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `id`          | `integer` | The ID of the product. 'requiredIf' it is an existing product. |
| `name`        | `string`  | The name of the product. 'requiredIf' it is a custom product.  |
| `price`       | `number` | The price of the product. 'requiredIf' it is a custom product. |
| `quantity`    | `integer` | The amount of the product. |

id.description: Custom Product ID,a unique identifier or code that is manually assigned or customized to represent a specific product within the order.

quantity.description: The specific number or count of a customized product item available in inventory or associated with an order, reflecting the quantity of that product.

name.description: Custom product name, a user-defined or manually specified title given to a particular product.

price.description: Custom product price, the individually determined or user-defined cost associated with a specific customized product, often set based on unique attributes or requirements, and used for pricing and financial calculations within a business or sales system.

coupon.description: Codes that can be redeemed for discounts or other benefits when making a purchase.

id.description: Customer ID. Required if both variables `customer.mobile` and `customer.name` are not in the request. List of customer ID can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394121).

mobile.description: Customer Mobile. Required if the variable `customer.id` is not in the request.

name.description: Customer Name. Required if the variable `customer.id` is not in the request.

email.description: Customer Email. Required if the variable `customer.id` is not in the request.

name.description: Receiver Name

country.description: Receiver Country. Fetch a list of country codes using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/5394228e0) endpoint.

phone.description: Receiver Phone

email.description: Receiver Email

notify.description: Whether or not to notify Receiver

status.description: Payment Status

method.description: Payment Methods. Required if the variable `status` value is set to `paid`

accepted_methods.description: Payment Accepted Methods by the store. Required if the variable `status` value is set to `pending_payment`

reference_id.description: Required if the variable `method` value is set to `bank` or `subscription` - For bank use the id of the bank and for subscription use the id of the subscription

receipt_image_path.description: Receipt Image Path. Required if the variable `method` value is set to `bank`

cash_on_delivery.description: Cash on Delivery details. Required if the variable `method` value is set to `cod`

recurring.description: Required as `true` when using Recurring Payments, To create a subscription, you must include the `products.recurring` object for each subscription product and set the `payment.recurring` field to `true`. See the [Recurring Payments API](https://docs.salla.dev/1650500m0).

delivery_method.description: Delivery Method. This variable is required if one or more products require shipping

branch_id.description: Branch ID. Required if the variable `delivery_method` value is set to `pickup`. List of branches can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394224).

courier_id.description: Courier ID. Required if the variable `delivery_method` value is set to `shipping`. List of shipping companies can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/5394239e0)

ship_to.description: Ship to destination details. Required if the variable `delivery_method` value is  `shipping`

country.description: Ship to destination country. Fetch a list of country codes using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/5394228e0) endpoint.

city.description: Ship to destination city. Fetch a list of city codes using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/5394230e0) endpoint.

district.description: Ship to destination district. Fetch a list of districts codes using [this](https://docs.salla.dev/21655021) endpoint.

short_address.description:
A compact 8-character Saudi address code (4 letters + 4 digits), e.g., RHMA3184.
It provides a simplified, precise version of the National Address to speed up delivery and reduce input errors. This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA).

building_number.description: The National Address building number associated with the location.This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA)

additional_number.description: An additional National Address identifier used for more precise location specification.This field is required only for addresses in Saudi Arabia (KSA).

lat.description: Ship to destination geo coordinates latitude

lang.description: Ship to destination geo coordinates longitude

identifier.description:
identifier value
- if the variable `identifier_type` value is set to `sku`, then the datatype of this variable will be `string`
- if the variable `identifier_type` value is set to `id`, then the datatype of this variable will be `number`

quantity.description: Product quantity value

options.description: Product options details. Required if the product has advanced options

id.description: Product option ID

value.description: Product option value

donating_amount.description: Product donating amount. Required if the store is of type `جمعيات خيرية | charity`

interval_unit.description: The unit of time for billing cycles.
interval_unit.title: interval_unit

interval_count.description: The number of interval units between billing cycles (e.g., 30 days, 1 month)

meta.description: Custom metadata object for storing additional information like plan details, customer notes, or tracking data

recurring.description: Required for creating subscription orders. [Recurring payments](https://docs.salla.dev/1650500m0) should be enabled on the account to use this functionality

name.description: Template Name.

user_id.description: Employee User ID. List of Empoloyee can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394259)

value.description: Order Rule Entity Value

order_id.description: Order ID. List of Order ID can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394146)

identifier.description: Order Item Identifier ID. List of Order Items can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5565737)

quantity.description: Order Item Quantity

branch_id.description: Branch ID. List of Branch ID can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394224).

id.description: Product Option ID

name.description: Product Name, list of products can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

price.description: Product Price.

status_id.description: Order Status ID, list of Status ID's can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394150)

sort.description: The sorting position on the Merchant dashboard.

action_name.description: The actions to be conducted in bulk, which the value can only be from the enum list mentioned.

status.description: Status value

send_status_sms.description: Whether or not to send the status via sms

return_police.description: Whether or not to return the policy

restore_items.description: Whether or not to restore items

branch_id.description: Unique branch ID number. Get a list of Branch IDs from [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394224/?nav=01J1Y9KTRRDA57Q8ZSW95TTVDB)

anyOf.description: When the `action_name` is set to `change_status` send the following variables.
When the `action_name` is set to `assign_users` send an array of [Users IDs](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394259/?nav=01J1Y9KTRRDA57Q8ZSW95TTVDB)
When the `action_name` is set to `assign_tags` send an array of [Order Tags](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394154/?nav=01J1Y9KTRRDA57Q8ZSW95TTVDB).

value.description: Value can either be an object, an array of strings or array of integers. This variable is not required for some actions, such as `print_prepare_list`, but required in some other actions, such as `change_status`

order_ids.description: List of Order IDs. Fetch a list of orders from [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394146)

order_status.description: List of Order Statuses. Fetch a list of orders statuses from [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394150)

action.description: Action to be performed on the transaction; actions from the enum values only are allowed.

action_name.description: Product's action name signifying the action to perform based on the filters.

channels.description: Channels where the product is published. Works with `sale-channels` action

mahly_category_id.description: Mahally category ID. Works with the `features` action

categories.description: Array of category IDs that you wish to associate the product with. Works with the `features` action

brand_id.description: The brand ID that you wish to associate the product with. Works with the `features` action

tags.description: Array of tag IDs that you wish to associate with the product

notify_quantity.description: Quantity to be notified with. Works with `notify-quantity` action

minimum_notify_quantity.description: Minimum quantity to be notified with. Works with `notify-quantity` action

column.description: Desired coumn to edit. works with the pricing action.

formula.description:
A formula can be added to edit the pricing of one or multiple product.  works with the pricing action.
Fixed formulas can be passed as shown in the below table:
if column type is `cost_price`
|       Description         |Formula                          
|----------------|-------------------------------
|Adding fixed amount to cost|`cost_price + amount`     
|adding profit percentage to cost|`cost_price + (cost_price * amount /100 )`            
|new cost price |`amount`

if column type is `sale_price`
|       Description         |Formula                          
|----------------|-------------------------------
|Adding fixed amount to cost|`cost_price + amount`
|adding profit percentage to cost|`cost_price + (cost_price * amount /100 )`  
|subtracting fixed amount from cost| `price - amount`
|discount percentage on price|`price - (price * amount /100 )`
|fixed discount on sale price|`sale_price - amount`
|discount percentage on sale price|`sale_price - (sale_price * amount /100 )`
|New sale price | `amount`

if column type is `price`
|       Description         |Formula                          
|----------------|-------------------------------
|Adding fixed amount to cost|`cost_price + amount`  
|adding profit percentage to cost|`cost_price + (cost_price * amount /100 )`  
|adding fixed amount to price|`price + amount`
|adding profit percentage on price|`price + (price * amount /100 )`
|new price|`amount`

amount.description: the amount to be used in the `formula` field. works with the pricing action.

apply_on.description: options to apply the pricing on. works with the pricing action.

value.description: An array that will hold information based on the action type.

select_all.description: Whether ot not to select all products

ids.description: List of product IDs that you wish to apply the actions on. List of products IDs can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

categories.description: Filter using the categories that you wish to update product in.

brands.description: Filter using brand ID(s) that you with to update products in. List of brands IDs can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394213).

status.description: Filter using product status.

identifer_type.description: Identifier Type. Value can either be `id` , `variant_id` or `sku`

identifer.description: Identifier Value, such as Product ID or and sku

quantity.description: Quantity Value

mode.description: Mode of quantity update; one of the allowed enum values

unlimited_quantity.description: Option to indicate the product is of unlimited quantity

points.description: Loyalty points, required unless rest_point is set to true

reset_points.description: Boolean value to reset loyalty points

type.description: The type of increasing points or decreasing points "plus" or "minus"

reason.description: Text for showing the reason for the update

items.description: List of customers to increase or decrease the loyalty points

customers.description: Customers list that will receive loyalty points

id.description: Product ID. List of products IDs can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

name.description: Product name. List of products can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394168).

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit is a unique alphanumeric code used to identify and manage specific products within a company's inventory.

mpn.description: Manufacturer Part Number, a unique identifier assigned by a manufacturer to a specific product or component, which helps distinguish it from other similar products and facilitates inventory management, product tracking, and ordering processes.

gtin.description: "Global Trade Item Number" (GTIN), a unique and standardized identifier used to uniquely represent products, items, or services in the global marketplace, to enable efficient tracking and management across supply chains and retail sectors.

description.description: A product description provides detailed information about an item, helping customers understand its features, benefits, and intended use.

mahly_category_id.description: Category ID in Mahally app. List of categories can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394207).

price.description: Product price

sale_price.description: Product discounted price.  Must be less than the selling price

sale_end.description: The date which the discount should end. Should alway be more than today's date

maximum_quantity_per_order.description: Product's maximum quantity allowed per order

weight.description: The classification or unit of measurement used to specify the weight of an object or item, such as kilograms (kg), pounds (lb), ounces (oz), or grams (g).

weight_type.description: The classification or unit of measurement used to specify the weight of an object or item, such as kilograms (kg), pounds (lb), ounces (oz), or grams (g).

calories.description: Amount of calories. Applicable for product of type `food`

title.description: Promotional Title

notify_quantity.description: Indicates if the low quantity notification is enabled or not

brand_id.description: Brand ID to assign the product to. List of brands IDs can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394213).

branches.description: Branches to assign the product to Array of IDs. List of Branches IDs can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394224).

with_tax.description: Indicates if the product is with tax or not

show_in_web.description: Whether or not to show the product in the store front.

show_in_app.description: Whether or not to show the product in the merchant's mobile app.

require_shipping.description: Whether or not the product requires shipping.

hide_quantity.description: Whether or not to hide products quantity in the store front.

enable_note.description: Whether or not to enable writing notes by the customer.

enable_upload_image.description: Whether or not to enable uploading an image by the customer.

name.description: Webhook name. List of Webhook names can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394135).

url.description: Webhook registered URL. `requiredif` no ID is passed.

version.description: Version of the webhook; either valued as `1` or `2`

rule.description: Operations, expressions and conditions to your webhook. For example, you may use `=`,`!=`,`AND`,`OR` etc in such a menner: `payment_method = YOUR_PAYMENT_METHOD` or in combination `company_id = 871291 OR price < 50`. That adds more capbility to filter the response based on conditions

key.description: Any header key, which its value is sent in the post request to the webhook URL

value.description: The value sent to the webhook; for example: `cf-ray: 669af54ecf55dfcb-FRA`

name.description: Option name.

type.description: Type of product option.

display_type.description: The manner in which product choices or attributes are presented.

name.description: option name in English
Option Name in French

is_default.description: indicates if the value is default or not

details.description: Option Details. Visible if `with=details` query paramter is passed

anyOf.description: Send the `boolean` variable if the entity value `type` is set to `boolean`
Send the `string` variable if the entity value `type` is set to `string`
Send the `array` variable if the entity value `type` is set to `dropdown`

value.description: Required if entity type value is either: boolean, string, or dropdown

code.description: Affiliate Code. It must be 5 characters, only English letters or Numbers are valid.

commission_type.description: If `comission_type` is `fixed`, then use a numeric value such as `100`. If `comission_type` is `percentage`, then use a percentage value such as `15`%.

apply_to.description: Where the affiliatelink should be applied to. Available values are `all_orders` or `first_order`.

name.description: The label or display name of the shipping route

type.description: The route behavior that determines how shipping companies are shown or assigned during checkout

status.description: Route status where `1` = **active** and `0` = **inactive**

priority.description: The manual sort order of the route; lower numbers indicate higher priority

branded.description: Configuration settings specific to `branded` route types

condition_match.description: Defines whether all or any of the listed conditions must be met for this route to apply

name.description: The name of the shipping route

type.description: The route type used to determine how the shipping method is displayed and applied

priority.description: Determines the selection priority for the route; lower numbers have higher priority

combinable.description: Whether this route can be used with other applicable routes

pricing.description: Pricing configuration for the branded route

amount_per_unit.description: Extra charge per weight unit (required if pricing type is 'rate')

up_to_weight.description: Maximum weight covered by the base cost (required if pricing type is 'rate')

per_unit.description: Charge for each unit above the base weight (required if pricing type is 'rate')

condition_match.description: Defines whether all conditions must be met ('all') or any condition is sufficient ('any')

companies.description: List of shipping companies associated with the default route

company_id.description: The ID of the shipping company to which this allocation route applies.

rules.description: A set of conditions that must be met for this route to be applied.

action.description: The action to be taken when all the defined rules are satisfied.

name.description: Descriptive name of the allocation route for easy identification.

company_id.description: The ID of the shipping company to which this allocation route applies.

scope_id.description: The ID of the store scope (marketplace or region) for which allocation settings are being applied. Required only if the store supports multi-markets

strategy.description:
The allocation strategy to determine how orders are assigned to branches. Possible values:
•`priority`:  Orders are assigned based on branch priority.
•`closest_to_customer`: Orders go to the nearest branch.
•`most_stock`: Orders go to the branch with the highest stock.

branch_id.description: The unique identifier of the branch whose priority is being defined

priority.description: The position of the branch in the allocation order. Must be sequential, starting at 1

priorities.description: A list of branches with their priority values. Determines the order in which branches are considered for order allocation, Required if `strategy` = `priority`

status.description: Indicates whether the delivery zone is active `(true)` or inactive `(false)`

branch_id.description: The branch to which this delivery zone belongs, list of branches can be found [here](https://docs.salla.dev/api-5394224)

enabled.description: Indicates if the delivery coverage is currently active for this zone

method.description:
Specifies the method used to define the delivery area:
•`radius`  circular zone based on a center point.
•`polygon`  custom geofenced area defined by coordinates.

radius_meters.description: Required when `method` is `radius`; specifies the radius (in meters) of the delivery area.

coordinates.description: List of geographic points (`lat`/`lng`) defining the polygonal delivery zone. Required when`method` is `polygon`

enabled.description: Indicates whether the delivery is active on that day.

from.description: List of start times for working intervals on that day.

to.description: List of end times matching each from time.

day.description:
Specifies the delivery or service availability for each day of the week.
Each key represents a day (`sunday`,`monday`,`tuesday`,`wednesday`,`thursday`,`friday`,`saturday`)

working_hours.description: Defines the operating schedule (opening and closing times) for each day of the week for a specific delivery zone or route

rules.description: Contains configuration rules for delivery coverage
